identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a dark, atmospheric, and immersive interface for Geist: the Sin-Eaters.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Gothic Horror with Modern Dashboard functionality.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a bargain with the dead.
Content is King: The story is the hero; the UI is the medium.
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. Spectral glows.
Negative Space: Let the darkness breathe.
anti_patterns: No 'friendly' rounded corners (use sharp or slightly rounded 4px).

usage.headings: Use 'Crimson Text' for all section titles, character names, and dramatic reveals.
usage.body: Use 'Manrope' for chat logs, descriptions, and general text.
usage.mono: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for dice results, attribute values, and system messages.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) with occasional 'tracing beam' effects.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays (opacity 0.03) to simulate film grain or dust.

buttons.primary: bg-teal-900/30 text-teal-200 border border-teal-500/50 hover:bg-teal-500/20 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(20,184,166,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 font-mono tracking-wider uppercase text-sm px-6 py-2 rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-all duration-200 font-mono text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-zinc-800 p-6 rounded-md relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-teal-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-teal-500/30 text-zinc-200 placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-sm p-3 transition-all

layout_strategies.dashboard: Use a Bento Grid layout. Create asymmetry. Hero section (Chat) takes 60-70% width, Side panel (Character Sheet) takes 30-40%.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8). Don't crowd the spirits.
layout_strategies.containers: Wrap main content in a max-w-[1600px] container. Center it.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons should glow on hover. Cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1).
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-in for chat messages and list items.

image_urls.description: Dark wrought iron gate, good for login/hero background.
Green smoke/mist, good for overlays or 'magic' effects.
Eerie portrait, good for character sheet placeholder.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is light enough (zinc-200) against dark backgrounds. Avoid dark grey on black.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for all icon buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Crimson Text', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (Ectoplasm Teal, Sacrificial Crimson).
3. BUILD LAYOUT: Create a Sidebar Layout. Sidebar for sessions/history, Main area for Chat, Right panel (collapsible) for Character Sheet.
4. IMPLEMENT CHAT: The chat interface is the 'Stage'. Make it look like a script or a journal. User distinct styles for AI (Storyteller) and User (Player).
5. DANGER: Do not use light mode. Lock the app to Dark Mode.
6. MICRO-ANIMATIONS: Use framer-motion for dice rolls and panel transitions.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
